title: Dal Curry with Beetroot Sambal
summary: A simple dal curry served on a bed of rice with fiery beetroot sambal. This is a picture-perfect weeknight dinner.

method.description: Make the Coconut Dal batch recipe.
Toast your desiccated coconut in a dry frying pan over a medium heat for 2 mins, then tip it into a bowl.
Pop a box grater over the same bowl, and grate in the beetroot. Squeeze in the juice of a lime, then give it a really good mix. Season with salt to taste.
Heat your rice following packet instructions, then spoon it into bowls. Top it with your dal and beetroot sambal, and some extra coriander leaves if you like. Serve.

chefs.name: Sophie Wyburd
chefs.summary:
Sophie Wyburd is a cook and food writer specialising in simple, hearty comfort food, informed by her love of cookbooks and background in restaurant kitchens. You can find her co-hosting the 'A Bit of a Mouthful' and 'I’ll Have What She’s Having' podcasts, and hosting sell-out supper clubs in London. Her debut cookbook 'Tucking In' will be released in June 2024.

Photo credit: Stuart Simpson
